bikes.description:
CCM. Older heavy mountain bike. Dark purple frame with little paint specs in it. WHITE HANDLEBARS with black hand gripps. One red reflector on back. Wider padded seat bought separately with small side rips in it. Tire air cap missing on front wheel, there is one for back wheel.
Gear cables near right back wheel are shredded & coming apart. Ladies bike with sloped frame. Large bike with med tires, not  slim tires. Not sure if aluminum or steel frame. STOLEN FROM KINGSWAY MALL BIKE RACK IN EDMONTON in afternoon  June/2024. Locked with key lock, owned for ten years.
bikes.title: CCM CCM

bikes.description: A1 Premium Aluminum, frame geometry designed for 130mm front travel, disc only, ORE DT with forged BB yoke and shell with ISCG mounts, reinforced disc mount, forged and externally machined HT, forged alloy drop outs with eyelets and replaceable derailleur hanger

A white Corratec X vert elite
Accessories: black bike pouch attached to the front of the handles, white water bottle holder, rear view mirror on the left handle but without the mirror cause it got broken, mud guard on the back wheel, white light attached to the back wheel, black small bell left side of the front handle
bikes.title: 2024 Corratec BK27021-49

bikes.description: a black mountain bike with green glowing “HiLand” lettering. It has no baskets or lights attached. The bike has a large frame (582 mm), 2.1 inch wide wheels with a diameter of 29 inches. It features a black bottle cage and a black saddle with some scratches on one side. The entire bike is black with green glossy lettering and stickers. It has full front and rear gear shifting and disc brakes.
bikes.title: 2023 Hiland MTB 29 inch

bikes.description: The color is "Desert Sand Matte." The front and rear tires are different sizes, and they have different tread patterns. Their is significant wear on the rear tire. The saddle is an Ergon SM E-Mountain Pro Bike Saddle, size M/L, color black.

bikes.description: REI Co-op Cycles DRT 1.1 Mountain Bike. Color is 'pirate black', looks black/gray in person. Says 'co-op' in white lettering on the side. Has a white waterbottle holder and a kick stand. At the time it was stolen it had an old cable bike lock attached to the handle bars/frame. Also had a phone mount attached to handle bars. Wheel size is 27.5 inches, bike has 21 gears. Stolen from bike rack on car in hotel parking lot in downtown Salt Lake City, Utah.
bikes.title: 2022 REI Co-op DRT 1.1 Mountain Bike

bikes.description: Swapped mountain tires for Bontrager hybrid,. Scuff on the left side of the seat and on handlebars. Front reflector has a slight crack and one of the pedals is missing 1 reflector (I think it's the right). Had front, back light and phone mount.

Black water bottle holder Neon green valve stems, wide seat with black electrical tape covering it.  Freewheels Houston sticker on right side of the frame.  No derailer. Light under the seat and on wheels.  Small silver bell on left handle bar. Black zip ties on bottom part of frame

bikes.description:
• Trek 820 26" Mountain Bike
• Light Blue to Dark Blue gradient colour - front to back
• Has “Mountain Track” on cross bar
• Rear Black Tire Rim
• Plastic Cages on Heavy Metal Pedals
• Missing Reflector on Back of Right Pedal
• Quick disconnect leavers on front and rear tires as well as seat
• Seat has small tear on right side bottom of seat
• Heavy Duty Rectangular Metal Lock with Yellow stripe
• Attached to Black Cable
• Rear Black Bike Rack with plastic tray and Rectangle Red Reflector
• Shield Emblem on front Frame Bar
• Rotating "Shifter" on Left Front Handle Bar
• Sponge Handle Bar Grips
• Water Bottle Holder attached to down tube
• Small Skull Emblem for cables management on front of bike tube
bikes.title: 1995 Trek Mountain Bike

bikes.description: A men’s Trek, 820 mountain bike, 26 inch with a black Schwinn cruiser seat a basic bracket for a sports bottle, handles that have two handles on each side for a better grip when writing, a smart phone holder attached in the middle. The bike was a cross between a Robin blue, and a navy blue color. I had just had the left brake repaired the day that it got stolen.
bikes.title: Trek

bikes.description: It is a Mongoose Mountain Bike from the supplier Pacific Cycle, Inc. It is silver with red writing up one side. Black tires and may be attached to black cord which was locking it to a bike rack. it is 26" Mens Detention
bikes.title: Mongoose 70092814

bikes.description: This is a very special limited edition mountain bike, and is number 33/100. It is mostly black with gold highlights, gold suspension, gold seat post, and some other parts. It has a small rip in the seat on the left side. It has 29 inch wheels. Estimated value 4,800

Bike is midnight blue with white logos: Mountain Sport Limited" and Sticker on the right side of the top tube: Stay Out There. Rims are Sumo 26 x 1.75

Has WTB Volt Saddle with Surly sunrise handlebars and HT midnight blue pedals.

Sugino Cranks and Kenda K-rad 26 x 2.3" tires

bikes.description: A light slate grey (kinda blue) Specialized mountain bike. Single suspension/ Hardtail. Disk brakes. Red/Orange lettering, Red bottle holder.
bikes.title: 2019 Specialized Pitch

bikes.description: Excellent condition with a recent tune-up. Aluminum gravel bike frame. Mechanical disc brakes. The groupset parts are SRAM Apex 1 and Praxis. Wide Clement gravel tires. HED rims. On the top side of the down tube is a partial silver sticker (I waited too late to remove the sticker fully, so part of the sticker stayed). The bike also had a Topeak bike rack on the back and mountain bike clipless pedals and a bike light on the handlebar. The bike tape on both sides of the handlebars was worn away.
bikes.title: 2018 Raleigh Amelia 3

Bike seat is black with orange on the underside

bikes.description: The bike is a Norco Storm brand dark gray 18-speed mountain bike. It had a Topeak MTX rear carrier and black wire basket, and front and back LED lights, plus a plastic water bottle cage. The saddle was torn on one side.
bikes.title: 2018 Norco Bikes

bikes.description: Mainly black mountain bike with blue accents. Marin logo on frame. It has a small black bell on the right side of the handle bar, gear shifters, a bottle holder, and a holster for a Kryptonite U-Lock. On the lower tube of the frame there's a SafeBikes sticker registered to #017586.
bikes.title: 2018 Marin Bikes Bolinas Ridge 1
